name: respira-wordpress-skills
description: 26 specialised WordPress skills covering page-builder migrations (12 paths including Divi to Gutenberg, Elementor to Bricks, WPBakery to Gutenberg), site audits (technical debt, mobile experience, WooCommerce health), content workflows (internal linking, content portability, SEO/AEO), and onboarding. Auto-activates relevant skills as you describe what you want to do. Companion to Respira for WordPress Claude Co-work plugin.
